fields.description: Nachani Satva (With Sugar) by  Katdarefoods  is a tasty and healthy option for people of all ages. Made from pure Nachani Satva, also known as नाचणी सत्व, it is packed with natural nutrients like calcium and iron. This ready-to-make mix already contains sugar, so you just need to add milk and cook – making it perfect for busy mornings or quick snacks. Whether for kids, elders, or anyone looking for a wholesome treat, Nachani Satva with Sugar is a simple and delicious choice you can enjoy every day.

fields.name: Methi Dal (Methi Puriya)
fields.short_description: Fenugreek seeds are  the small, hard, brownish seeds of the Trigonella foenum-graecum plant, native to the Mediterranean, southern Europe, and western Asia .   They have a slightly sweet, nutty flavor and a distinct maple-syrup aroma.   The seeds are used as a culinary spice in dishes, as
fields.description: Fenugreek seeds are  the small, hard, brownish seeds of the Trigonella foenum-graecum plant, native to the Mediterranean, southern Europe, and western Asia .   They have a slightly sweet, nutty flavor and a distinct maple-syrup aroma.   The seeds are used as a culinary spice in dishes, as a flavoring agent, and as a traditional supplement for a range of health benefits

fields.description:
Katdare's Soyabean Chutney is a delicious and nutritious condiment made from roasted soybeans and a blend of spices. This chutney has a nutty and slightly spicy taste that makes it a perfect accompaniment for a variety of dishes such as dosas, idlis, sandwiches, and salads. It is rich in protein, dietary fiber, and essential minerals, making it a healthy addition to any meal. The Soyabean Chutney is easy to use and can be enjoyed as a dip or spread. Discover the Rich Flavor of Soyabean Chutney.  Buy Soyabean Chutney Online  for a Nutty, Crunchy Delight.

 Katdare Batata Wada Mix  makes it easy to quickly prepare tasty batata vada. Also known as Aloo Bonda in some regions, batata wada is a favorite Indian snack in almost every household. Don't worry if you don't know the right spice proportions. Katdare Vada Masala
fields.description:
Katdare Batata Wada Mix 
 Katdare Batata Wada Mix  makes it easy to quickly prepare tasty batata vada. Also known as Aloo Bonda in some regions, batata wada is a favorite Indian snack in almost every household. Don't worry if you don't know the right spice proportions. Katdare Vada Masala has the perfect blend of spices in just the right amounts. Use Katdare Batata Wada Mix to enjoy delicious potato fritters on their own or in a Vada Pav.  Buy बटाटा वडा मसाला  today and enjoy this classic snack! Authentic Indian flavors are made easy. Explore our range of  instant mixes  and spice blends for quick, delicious meals at home. Order now!

Crafted with a combination of crispy sev, boondi, gathiya, and crunchy nuts, each bite brings the perfect balance of spice and savor. fields.description: Crunchy, tangy, and bursting with authentic flavors- our Puneri Dry Bhel is a true taste of Pune in every bite. Made with crisp puffed rice, roasted peanuts, sev, and a special blend of spices, it delivers the perfect harmony of zesty, savory, and lightly spiced notes. Whether as a quick snack on the go or a flavorful companion to your evening tea, this classic Maharashtrian treat never fails to delight!

fields.description:
Experience Authentic Indian Flavors: Unlock the true taste of India with the Katdare Swad Bhara Combo, a versatile collection of our most beloved spice blends. 
 Curated for Culinary Excellence: This essential pack includes meticulously crafted masalas for Pav Bhaji, Shev Bhaji, Chole, Biryani/Pulav, Misal, Paneer, and a versatile Kitchen King. 
 Street Food & Everyday Delights: From the tangy zest of Kacchi Dabeli and Chat Masala to the rich aromas of your favorite curries, effortlessly recreate iconic Indian dishes at home. 
 Premium Quality, Pure Spices: Each blend is made with the finest quality, hand-picked spices, ensuring authentic taste, vibrant aroma, and consistent results every time. 
 Your Complete Spice Solution: Simplify your cooking and elevate your meals with this all-in-one combo, perfect for both seasoned chefs and aspiring home cooks.

fields.description: The ready to cook  Upwas Combo by Katdare  is a perfect companion for your fasting days, bringing together a wholesome and delicious assortment of upwas essentials. It includes nutritious  Upwas Bhajani ,  Somwar Bhajani , and  Rajgira Peeth  to prepare a variety of filling meals. Make your fast special with crispy delights from  Upwas Dosa Peeth  and  Shingada Peeth . Add a burst of flavor with our tangy  Sweet Lime Pickle  and spicy  Upwas Chutney , all seasoned perfectly with pure  Shendelon (Rock Salt) . Katdare’s Upwas Combo ensures that your fasts are tasty, satisfying, and hassle-free!

Made by grinding roasted peanuts into a fine, fragrant powder, it is widely used in Indian kitchens for a variety of recipes. Many home cooks
fields.description: Peanut powder, also known as "Shengdana Kut" in Marathi (शेंगदाणा कूट), is a pantry staple that offers both rich flavor and high nutritional value. Made by grinding roasted peanuts into a fine, fragrant powder, it is widely used in Indian kitchens for a variety of recipes. Many home cooks and professional chefs alike prefer to buy roasted peanut powder online from trusted brands like  Katdarefoods  for consistency in quality and taste. Whether you are cooking for your family or preparing dishes for a special occasion, Katdarefoods' roasted peanut powder ensures you get the best results every time.

fields.short_description: Nachani Satva (Without Sugar) by Katdare Foods  is a premium  sprouted ragi malt  made using carefully selected ragi grains that are traditionally sprouted, slow-dried, and finely milled. This process improves digestion and nutrient absorption, making it an ideal  ragi malt for babies, tod
fields.description: Nachani Satva (Without Sugar) by Katdare Foods  is a premium  sprouted ragi malt  made using carefully selected ragi grains that are traditionally sprouted, slow-dried, and finely milled. This process improves digestion and nutrient absorption, making it an ideal  ragi malt for babies, toddlers, and health-conscious adults . Free from added sugar and preservatives, it is a cleaner, healthier alternative to regular ragi flour and is perfect for preparing  baby ragi malt, Ambil, Nachani laddu, and ragi porridge  for daily nourishment.

fields.name: Coleus Root Pickle / Mahani Root Pickle 200g
fields.short_description: Coleus root pickle, known as  Mainmula Lonache  or  Garmar Achar , is   a tangy, spicy Indian condiment made from the edible roots of the Coleus plant  (Plectranth us barbatus), valued for its unique flavor and traditional medicinal uses, often pickled with lemon, chilies, mustard oil, and
fields.description:
Coleus root pickle, known as  Mainmula Lonache  or  Garmar Achar , is   a tangy, spicy Indian condiment made from the edible roots of the Coleus plant  (Plectranth us barbatus), valued for its unique flavor and traditional medicinal uses, often pickled with lemon, chilies, mustard oil, and aromatic spices for a zesty side dish with rice, bread, or curries. 
 A versatile accompaniment to Indian meals (rice, roti, curry) or even in sandwiches.

Perfect for those
fields.description:
Make festive gifting truly personal with our  Festive Gift Box . Pick  any 5 products  from our wide range everything from  traditional favorites  to  unique flavors  of  chiwda, snacks, and sweets  and create a combo that feels thoughtful, fresh, and made just for them. Perfect for those who love sharing great taste with family, friends, clients, or colleagues. 
 Add an extra touch with a gift that’s  custom-built to your choice  whether you want a classic Maharashtrian mix, a spicy snack combo, a sweet-and-savory balance, or something totally different. It’s ideal for  Diwali gifting, office hampers, family visits, return gifts,  and last-minute surprises because you choose what goes inside. 
 To place your Festive Gift Box order, click the WhatsApp button below and message us your 5 selected products.  We’ll confirm availability, packing, and delivery details right away.

fields.description: Katdare Foods  Kadipatta Chutney  is made from  fresh curry leaves (kadi patta), roasted dals, sesame seeds, cumin, and spices , carefully roasted and ground for a rich, aromatic flavour. This traditional dry chutney works perfectly as a  dip, spread, or seasoning  for  rice, dal, curries, chapati, bhakri, sandwiches, and snacks , making it an easy everyday accompaniment.
